chunks.title: Contrasts on Wisdom and Wealth
chunks.reason: A series of antithetical couplets contrasting the wise and wicked regarding discipline, speech, and wealth.

chunks.title: The Value of Counsel and Insight
chunks.reason: Continues the theme of wisdom through specific contrasts on arrogance, hope, instruction, and messengers.

chunks.title: Consequences of Discipline and Action
chunks.reason: Focuses on the outcomes of accepting or neglecting discipline, walking with others, and leaving an inheritance.
